name: io.github.cyanheads/tmdb-mcp-server
description: Search, detail, and discovery for movies, TV, and people on The Movie Database (TMDB).

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: TMDB v4 API Read Access Token (JWT). Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer'. Create one at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api.

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_LANGUAGE
environmentVariables.description: Default response language as ISO 639-1, optionally with region (e.g. 'en-US'). Per-call language overrides it.

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_DEFAULT_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Default ISO 3166-1 country hint (e.g. 'US') used in region-aware error messages.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: TMDB v4 API Read Access Token (JWT). Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer'. Create one at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api.

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_LANGUAGE

environmentVariables.name: TMDB_DEFAULT_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Default ISO 3166-1 country hint (e.g. 'US') used in region-aware error messages.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
